item.title: Anwar pans Bersih for calling MACC a ‘political tool’
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The prime minister says it is unfair for the reform group to make such an accusation.
Matched: corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: MACC plays part in global crackdown on LeakBase forum
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The anti-graft agency says the platform functioned as an online marketplace for stolen data such as credit and debit card numbers.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: MACC helps international partners shut down LeakBase forum trading stolen data worldwide
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 6 — The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) has joined a global law enforcement sweep...
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: FAM says Fifa sanctions unfair after losing CAS appeal
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Association says it accepted responsibility for 'oversight failures' during proceedings at the Court of Arbitration for Sport.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Surplus Pulau Pinang drops planned demonstration at Bukit Mertajam temple after talks with police

item.title: Fashion Valet founders allowed passports for haj visa arrangements
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Vivy Yusof and her husband Fadzarudin Shah Anuar are required to return the documents to the court on March 9.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Clear as day, FAM at fault in forgery case, says MP
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
PKR's Wong Chen asks why police have not arrested anyone yet.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Stop tug-of-war with Samsuri, focus on rebuilding Bersatu, Muhyiddin told
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Rais Yatim also tells the party president to work on uniting the Malay community.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Malaysia’s economic exposure to Mideast conflict minimal, says Sim
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The deputy minister says trade with Iran accounts for just 0.09% of Malaysia's overall trade, reaching RM2.45 billion last year.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Anwar urges caution in spending, business deals as Mideast crisis worsens
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The prime minister says early signs are not encouraging as the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked to ships.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: MA63 rights belong to all Sabahans, not political slogan, says Mustapha
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KOTA KINABALU, March 6 — Sabah’s rights under the Malaysia Agreement 1963 (MA63) are not a political slogan...
Matched: ministry(+2), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: March 13 hearing for Badrul’s appeal to obtain witness statement
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Bersatu division leader wants the statement recorded from a journalist to help him in his sedition trial.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: 4 claim trial to being members of ‘Captain Praba’ gang
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The prosecution asks that they be jointly tried with 13 others accused of belonging to the organised crime group.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Record high RM426.7bil approved investments in 2025
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim says this is an 11% increase from the approved investments recorded in 2024.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: 6 youths nabbed over alleged Islamic State-linked militant activities
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Inspector-General of Police Khalid Ismail says the suspects, half of whom are minors, are believed to have planned attacks on police stations and public infrastructure.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Najib's lawyers dispute 'incomplete' narrative of ex-SRC director's court testimony
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
Shafee & Co claims media failed to report 'critical concessions' made by Shahrol.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Guan Eng files appeal against quantum of damages in defamation suit
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Counsel says the RM50,000 damages awarded by the Shah Alam High Court does not reflect the seriousness of the defamatory statements and the harm caused.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)
